chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1278 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.6618/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. == Neither petitioner nor his counsel are present. This is an old matter pertaining to the year 2018 wherein the dismissal / termination of the petitioner has been challenged. The Court diary dated 18.03.2020 shows that the petitioner’s counsel himself stated that the appeal filed by the petitioner on account of alleged dismissal / termination is pending. Counsel for the petitioner is therefore directed to satisfy this Court as to maintainability of this petition when petitioner has already availed alternate remedy by filing appeal for alleged dismissal / termination. Adjourned to 13.03.2025 on which date, counsel for petitioner is directed to remain present and proceed with the matter. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
